title: Vanilla Stronghold Desktop [TARDIS Refined]
description:
A Desktop made from a Vanilla Generated Stronghold for TARDIS Refined

Equipped with Silverfish Spawner and End Portal
body:
A Custom TARDIS Desktop made from a Vanilla Generated Stronghold for the Mod TARDIS Refined

Equipped with Silverfish Spawner and End Portal

This is a large Desktop and obviously isn't exactly balanced, but it's funny.

Console is up the staircase to the right of the Tardis Door

Air Lock is... somewhere in those corridors.
